package rulefixtures

// scenario for path_split_dir_only: `path.Split(...)` when only the directory is used.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule623NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario623Negative(records []Rule623NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
